bullets: Collaborate with Senior Designer to redesign iRIS, a legacy enterprise product, contributing to hundreds of screens across complex, workflow-driven experiences.
Create wireframes, high-fidelity designs, and prototypes in Figma to support iterative design and stakeholder alignment.
Contribute to and expand a scalable component library, standardizing UI patterns and improving consistency across the platform.
Collaborate with stakeholders and developers to design new features and enhance existing workflows for Contract Insights, a contract management and procurement platform.
Lead the redesign of the Vendor Client Gateway, an external-facing portal, improving usability and overall user experience.
Create wireframes, high-fidelity designs, and prototypes in Figma to support iterative design.
Designed data-driven product experiences across multiple platforms.
Centralized and streamlined the design system to reduce weekly design time.
Collaborate with stakeholders to design features and functionality for Elements, an all-in-one cloud-managed security platform.
Lead end-to-end design for a guest access feature, from concept through delivery, improving usability and access workflows.

Conduct user research and testing, including writing scripts, running interviews and A/B tests, and creating interactive prototypes in ProtoPie; synthesize and present findings to stakeholders via Confluence.
Modernized analytics visualizations by replacing a legacy charts library.
Tested and debugged locally using Laragon, improving iteration speed.
Improved UI quality across a Symfony codebase with HTML/CSS/JS updates.
